title: botrychium × watertonense
intro: Botrychium × watertonense, commonly known as the Waterton's grapefern or Waterton's grape fern, is a rare and hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Botrychium × watertonense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited research and potential side effects.
